name: SOC Response Playbook — Incident 30fe8969-ab5c-4469-9c4e-8b1c441f809c
description:
Here’s an analysis of the security alert:

1.  **SUMMARY:** An unauthorized lateral movement within a network has been detected from a compromised SMB server.
2.  **TECHNIQUE:** T1059 – Lateral Movement
3.  **ACTION:** IMMEDIATELY isolate the source IP address (192.168.1.33) and investigate SMB connections originating from this IP to determine the scope of the attack.

action--1.name: Alert Ingestion
action--1.description: System received new raw SIEM log
